Official Cruise Itinerary
Day-by-Day Schedule
3
Pre-Cruise · Orlando → Miami
🚂 Brightline Departure
Board the Brightline high-speed train in Orlando. Arrive in Miami and check in to Aloft Miami – Brickell. Explore Brickell, enjoy dinner out, and rest up before embarkation day!
1
Day 1 · Miami, Florida, USA
Departs 5:00 PM local time · 🔔 All aboard by 3:00 PM
Embarkation day! Board the Resilient Lady at PortMiami, explore your cabin, grab your first cocktail, and watch Miami fade into the sunset. The adventure begins! 🌅
2
Day 2 · Key West, Florida, USA
⚓ 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM local time
The Conch Republic awaits! Spend the day exploring colorful Duval Street, fresh seafood spots, and historic landmarks. Join the Bar Crawl shore excursion for the ultimate Key West evening. 🍹
3
Day 3 · Day at Sea 🚢
Full day onboard the Resilient Lady
A blissful day at sea — spa sessions, pool deck lounging, casino, world-class dining, and evening entertainment. Everything onboard is yours to enjoy!
4
Day 4 · The Beach Club at Bimini, Bahamas
⚓ 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM local time
Virgin Voyages' private island paradise! Start the morning on the beach, hit the epic pool party, then explore the island on a golf cart. Don't miss the VV Beach Club — included for all sailors! 🌴
5
Day 5 · Miami, Florida, USA
Arrives 6:30 AM · 🔔 Allow up to 1 hr for gangway to open
Disembark with unforgettable memories. Transfer to MiamiCentral and board the Brightline back to Orlando. Until the next voyage! 🚂✨
Jun 5 · Key West
The Conch Republic 🌺
Famous for its laid-back vibe, historic architecture, fresh seafood & legendary nightlife on Duval Street. Southernmost point of the continental US!
Jun 7 · Bimini, Bahamas
VV Beach Club Paradise 🌴
Virgin Voyages' own private beach club on a tiny Bahamian island. Crystal turquoise water, powdery sand, pool parties & island vibes all day long.

Your Home at Sea
Meet the Resilient Lady
2,770
Sailors Capacity
110K
Gross Tonnage
20+
Restaurants
6
Pools & Whirlpools
0
Kids Onboard
🍽
20+ Eateries — All Included
The Wake steakhouse, Razzle Dazzle, Pink Agave Mexican, Extra Virgin Italian & more — every restaurant is included in your fare. No specialty fees.
🍹
Bars & No Drink Package Needed
All non-alcoholic drinks always included. Pre-purchase a Bar Tab for bonus credit on cocktails. 6+ unique bars from The Manor to Sip champagne bar.
🧖🏽‍♀️
The Redemption Spa
Award-winning spa: massages, facials, hair services, thermal suite, hydrotherapy pool & more. Book before sailing — sells out fast!
💃
Entertainment & Nightlife
Broadway-caliber shows, drag brunches, silent discos, live music & themed parties nightly. The Manor nightclub keeps the party going until 3am.
🏋🏽‍♀️
Fitness & Wellbeing
The Athletic Club gym, yoga, cycling, HIIT classes & a running track — all included. Work out with an ocean view!
🎰
Casino at Sea
Slots, table games & more. Open at sea for those who want to try their luck on vacation.
☀️
Pool Decks & Sun
Multiple pools, whirlpools, sun decks & Richard's Rooftop — the perfect adults-only oasis. No chair-saving drama here!
📶
WiFi Included by Package
Basic WiFi (Base & Essential) or Premium streaming WiFi on 2 devices (Premium). All included in your fare.
🛏
Stunning Cabins
Sea view or terrace on every cabin. Sea Terrace cabins feature hammocks! Rainfall showers, luxe bedding & thoughtful design throughout.
